div.p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Rabies schedule table in the Immunization CPG

tr.th: First rabies dose from the primary series was administered
Second rabies dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Rabies schedule table in the Immunization CPG

name.value: First rabies dose from the primary series was administered
Second rabies dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
